snippet.description:
Welcome to Bhooth Bangla. Yahan na toh log normal hain... Aur upar se Bangla bhi paranormal hai. 
Enter at your own risk 🧟‍♀️

#BhoothBanglaTrailer out now

snippet.title: Balls Up - Official Red Band Trailer (2026) Mark Wahlberg, Paul Walter Hauser, Sacha Baron Cohen
snippet.description:
Don't miss the Red Band Trailer for Balls Up, a comedy film distributed by Amazon MGM Studios. Secure a condom sponsorship with the World Cup in Balls Up, streaming on April 15 exclusively on Amazon Prime Video.

In Balls Up, marketing executives Brad and Elijah go “balls out” and pitch a bold full‑coverage condom sponsorship with the World Cup. After their drunken celebration in Brazil sparks a global scandal, they must outrun furious fans, criminals, and power-hungry officials to salvage their careers and make it home alive.

Balls Up stars Mark Wahlberg, Paul Walter Hauser, Benjamin Bratt, Eva De Dominici, Daniela Melchior, with Molly Shannon, Sacha Baron Cohen, and Eric André. The film is directed by Peter Farrelly and produced by David Ellison, Dana Goldberg, Don Granger, Andrew Muscato, Paul Wernick, and Rhett Reese.

Balls Up is streaming on April 15 exclusively on Amazon Prime Video.

What is Roblox? ROBLOX is an online virtual playground and workshop, where kids of all ages can safely interact, create, have fun, and learn. It’s unique in that practically everything on ROBLOX is designed and constructed by members of the community. ROBLOX is designed for 13 to 18 year olds, but it is open to people of all ages. Each player starts by choosing an avatar and giving it an identity. They can then explore ROBLOX — interacting with others by chatting, playing games, or collaborating on creative projects. Each player is also given their own piece of undeveloped real estate along with a virtual toolbox with which to design and build anything — be it a navigable skyscraper, a working helicopter, a giant pinball machine, a multiplayer “Capture the Flag” game or some other, yet-to-be-dreamed-up creation. There is no cost for this first plot of virtual land. By participating and by building cool stuff, ROBLOX members can earn specialty badges as well as ROBLOX dollars (“Robux”). In turn, they can shop the online catalog to purchase avatar clothing and accessories as well as premium building materials, interactive components, and working mechanisms.

snippet.title: The Cranberries - Scenes From 'Dreams' (Dir: Peter Scammell / Dolores Uncut)
snippet.description:
Scenes from 'Dreams' (Dir: Peter Scammell / Dolores) Uncut by The Cranberries

On March 18, 1993, Peter Scammell filmed Dolores O'Riordan performing "Dreams" on 35mm film. What you're watching is the full uncut performance, restored to 4K from the original scan. Some moments from this session made the official music video. The rest has been in the archive ever since.

"Dreams" is one of the rare songs to have had three separate music videos made for it, directed by John Maybury, Peter Scammell, and Nico Soultanakis. After "Linger" broke through, the band took the step of re-releasing Dreams, and the Scammell video went into heavy rotation on MTV's 120 Minutes. It became a Top 40 hit in the US and one of the defining songs of the decade.

Designed to give fans a deeper connection to the band's legacy, the "Scenes From" series strips away the traditional music video edit to present raw, 4K performance takes restored from the original film sources.

snippet.title: The Equalizer 4 (2026) | Denzel Washington, Ben Affleck, Amanda Seyfried | Concept Trailer
snippet.description:
#Equalizer4 #denzelwashington  #concepttrailer 

Watch This Equalizer 4 Fan Made Concept Trailer

Denzel Washington as Robert McCall has always been at his most compelling when the mission stops being about a stranger and starts being about something unfinished inside himself, and this concept delivers that internal conflict with surgical precision by making the enemy not a faceless organization but a man McCall built with his own hands. Ben Affleck as Victor Kessler — once the most promising student McCall ever trained, now leading a rogue black ops unit with the cold efficiency of someone who absorbed every lesson and discarded every moral framework that came with it — is the kind of villain that lands differently because his capability is entirely McCall's responsibility.

That specific weight, a mentor confronting the worst possible version of his own influence, gives every quiet scene in this concept the kind of pressure that makes the inevitable Paris confrontation feel genuinely earned rather than simply spectacular.

Amanda Seyfried as Elena Vance carrying her murdered mother's evidence through a city that has already decided she should not survive long enough to use it brings a fierce and desperate vulnerability to the role that makes McCall's protection of her feel deeply personal rather than professionally obligatory. Robert Pattinson as Marcus Cole hunting them both through Paris with the precision of a man trained in the same tradition as his target creates a pursuit that operates on multiple levels simultaneously — tactical, psychological, and deeply uncomfortable for a man who recognizes every move being made against him.

An abandoned power plant on the outskirts of Paris, mentor versus student, every technique McCall ever taught being turned back against him — watch this till the very end and tell us, when the monster you created comes for everything you protect, what does justice actually cost?

snippet.title: The Harry Potter Reboot Keeps Getting WORSE...
snippet.description:
The Harry Potter HBO trailer just dropped and I have a lot to say...

From the controversial casting of Snape, to the $100 million per episode budget, to why I think this reboot is going to do more harm than good to one of the most beloved franchises of all time. we are getting into all of it!!

I also compare the reboot to the original Harry Potter films and explain why older movies felt so different visually, and why so many modern shows now look flat, grey, and overly processed. This isn’t just a Harry Potter problem, it’s happening across Hollywood...

If you love movies, acting, or complaining about the state of Hollywood, this one’s for you!

snippet.description:

"How to Save a Life" is the quintessential 2000s song by The Fray, serving as a powerful anchor for early 2000s nostalgia with its haunting piano melody and raw, emotional storytelling. This mid-2000s hit remains a definitive throwback anthem, capturing a sense of melancholy and resilience that has made it one of the most iconic alternative rock ballads of the decade.✨

🔸Obserwuj The Fray w social mediach:
https://www.facebook.com/TheFray/
https://www.instagram.com/thefray/
https://x.com/TheFray

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
 
📃Lyrics:
[Verse 1]
Step one, you say, "We need to talk"
He walks, you say, "Sit down, it's just a talk"
He smiles politely back at you
You stare politely right on through
Some sort of window to your right
As he goes left and you stay right
Between the lines of fear and blame
You begin to wonder why you came
 
[Chorus]
Where did I go wrong? I lost a friend
Somewhere along in the bitterness
And I would have stayed up with you all night
Had I known how to save a life
 
[Verse 2]
Let him know that you know best
'Cause after all, you do know best
Try to slip past his defense
Without granting innocence
Lay down a list of what is wrong
The things you've told him all along
Pray to God He hears you
And pray to God He hears you, and
 
[Chorus]
Where did I go wrong? I lost a friend
Somewhere along in the bitterness
And I would have stayed up with you all night
Had I known how to save a life
 
[Verse 3]
As he begins to raise his voice
You lower yours and grant him one last choice
Drive until you lose the road
Or break with the ones you've followed
He will do one of two things
He will admit to everything
Or he'll say he's just not the same
And you'll begin to wonder why you came
 
[Chorus]
Where did I go wrong? I lost a friend
Somewhere along in the bitterness
And I would have stayed up with you all night
Had I known how to save a life
Where did I go wrong? I lost a friend
Somewhere along in the bitterness
And I would have stayed up with you all night
Had I known how to save a life
[Post-Chorus]
How to save a life
How to save a life
 
[Chorus]
Where did I go wrong? I lost a friend
Somewhere along in the bitterness
And I would have stayed up with you all night
Had I known how to save a life
Where did I go wrong? I lost a friend (Where did I go wrong?)
Somewhere along in the bitterness
And I would have stayed up with you all night (I would have stayed up)
Had I known how to save a life
 
[Outro]
How to save a life
How to save a life

What is Roblox? ROBLOX is an online virtual playground and workshop, where kids of all ages can safely interact, create, have fun, and learn. It’s unique in that practically everything on ROBLOX is designed and constructed by members of the community. ROBLOX is designed for 13 to 18 year olds, but it is open to people of all ages. Each player starts by choosing an avatar and giving it an identity. They can then explore ROBLOX — interacting with others by chatting, playing games, or collaborating on creative projects. Each player is also given their own piece of undeveloped real estate along with a virtual toolbox with which to design and build anything — be it a navigable skyscraper, a working helicopter, a giant pinball machine, a multiplayer “Capture the Flag” game or some other, yet-to-be-dreamed-up creation. There is no cost for this first plot of virtual land. By participating and by building cool stuff, ROBLOX members can earn specialty badges as well as ROBLOX dollars (“Robux”). In turn, they can shop the online catalog to purchase avatar clothing and accessories as well as premium building materials, interactive components, and working mechanisms.

snippet.title: Dominic Fike - Babydoll (Sub. Español)
snippet.description:
Dominic Fike - Babydoll (Letra / Lyrics en Español)

📝 Sobre la canción:
Baby Doll de Dominic Fike se siente como alguien atrapado entre lo que recuerda y lo que no puede soltar, esperando una llamada que nunca llega mientras el ruido intenta tapar el vacío. Entre líneas se asoman heridas del pasado que moldean su forma de amar, y aun así aparece ese deseo de escapar a un lugar casi irreal donde todo pese menos, aunque en el fondo sabe que algo no está bien… y por eso no puede avanzar, porque sigue ahí.

🎞️ Video Oficial de 'Babydoll': 
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=nb8CnIo_-_A&list=RDnb8CnIo_-_A&start_radio=1

Sigue a Dominic Fike acá:
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/dominicfikeofficial
Soundcloud: https://soundcloud.com/dominicfike
Twitter: https://twitter.com/dominicfike

#DominicFike #Babydoll #pop #alternative #alternative

✍️ Lyrics:
And I can't move on, babydoll
Waitin' on calls, flippin' through stations
I'm outclassed and it's outrageous (ooh)
And I'll take it all, babydoll
Whatever's been weighin' you down

(Eh-eh) find me on Miami concrete
Lookin' for somebody different 'cause my daddy was a pimp (ooh-ooh-ooh)
My mama had her issues but I miss her anyway
Oh, babydoll (ooh-ooh-ooh)

Please don't call me for the wrong reasons
We both know exactly what I'm thinkin'
Weeks pass and I never grow tired
'Cause I never said never and I barely ever lie
I'm on the road to an original place in outer space
I didn't make it up, but you can't find it on a phone or a globe
And I can take you with me if you really wanna go
Oh, babydoll, I can't move on

And I can't move on, babydoll
Waitin' on calls, flippin' through stations
I'm outclassed and it's outrageous (ooh)
And I'll take it all, babydoll
Whatever's been weighin' you down
